name: buildwithnexus
description: Interactive AI agent orchestrator with intent-based planning, execution, and brainstorming modes

scripts.postinstall: [ -d .git ] && npm run build && NEXUS_SRC=${NEXUS_SRC:-../nexus} npm run bundle || true
scripts.prepublishOnly: ([ -f dist/nexus-release.tar.gz ] && cp dist/nexus-release.tar.gz /tmp/nexus-release.tar.gz || true) && npm run build && ([ -d "${NEXUS_SRC:-../nexus}" ] && NEXUS_SRC=${NEXUS_SRC:-../nexus} npm run bundle || ([ -f /tmp/nexus-release.tar.gz ] && cp /tmp/nexus-release.tar.gz dist/nexus-release.tar.gz)) && ([ -f dist/nexus-release.tar.gz ] || (echo 'ERROR: nexus-release.tar.gz not found. Cannot publish without tarball required by buildwithnexus init' && exit 1))

author: Garrett Eaglin
